author: holgerd77
content:
Yesterday I put the new "community" version of https://feelyourprotocol.org online which is now fully built to take in your **(vibe-coded) protocol explorations** 👾  - so that others can "feel" better what a protocol change is all about. Really excited about that, put in a lot of work, the site has extensive docs and is super-structured to reduce friction to a minimum! 🤩

Happy to give some guidance for everyone who wants to try it out (questions also welcome)!

author: lightclient
content:
Hi! We put together some documents about the frame tx mempool. The first is a hackmd that outlines things a bit higher level and try to convey that there is a spectrum of choices / tradeoffs we can make. The second is a PR with a full spec of strategy #2 from the doc, which we believe is a reasonable choice to start with. PTAL! Happy to answer any questions
- https://hackmd.io/@matt/frame-mempool
- https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11415

author: txtiger
content: Hey, could one of the EIP-8141 authors take a look at [this pr](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11408) that delegates the default account code to EIP-7932. Mostly to reduce EIP-8141 complexity and fix the P256 malleability issue that EIP-7951 does not handle.
